name: Modular Storage Medium Green - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your space neat and tidy with the help of this Medium Modular Storage from Brightroom™. Featuring a semi-transparent design in a green hue, this rectangular modular storage basket comes in handy for stashing anything from notepads, stationery items, craft supplies, small everyday household items and more. This storage basket features a removable lid with an indexed design for easy carrying, and the stackable design lets you stack multiple same-sized baskets on top of each other for space-efficient storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
